steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A: $4x^2 + 21x + 33$ — matches.
  • B: $4x^2 + 21x + 29$ — wrong constant (29 instead of 33).
  • C: $4x^2 + x + 29$ — wrong $x$-coefficient and constant.
  • D: $4x^2 + x + 33$ — wrong $x$-coefficient (1 instead of 21).
That matches choice A — A is correct.
